getPaymentHistory_7e55128f09.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
*What Failed:*  
Unit test expecting NullPointerException actually received NumberFormatException.

*Where:*  
AppControllerGetPaymentHistoryTest.testUserWithNullUserIdThrowsException (line 159); root at AppController.getPaymentHistory (line 67).

*Why:*  
Null user ID input caused Integer.parseInt(null), which throws NumberFormatException, not NullPointerException.

*Investigate:*  
Update test to expect NumberFormatException or handle null user ID more gracefully in getPaymentHistory (e.g., pre-check input for null, throw a custom exception). Review how nulls are processed before parsing.,

getTransactiontHistory_29b1ff7483.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
What Failed: Test for handling null userId failed due to an unexpected exception type.  
Where: AppControllerGetTransactiontHistoryTest, method testUserWithNullUserIdThrowsException (line 117); actual error in AppController.getTransactiontHistory (line 85).  
Why: A NumberFormatException was thrown when parsing null, while the test expected a NullPointerException.  
Investigate: Review getTransactiontHistory for null userId handling—ensure proper validation and throw the correct exception. Adjust test expectations if logic is intentional. Also, remove unnecessary Mockito stubbings at testSessionWithExtraAttributesDoesNotAffectResponse (line 233).,

getAccountTransactiontHistory_8ce4880a24.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
* What Failed: Test expected NullPointerException but got NumberFormatException when account ID is missing.
* Where: AppControllerGetAccountTransactiontHistoryTest.java:79 (calls AppController.getAccountTransactiontHistory, line 104)
* Why: The code attempts to parse a null account ID as an integer, resulting in NumberFormatException instead of NullPointerException.
* Investigate: Update either the test to expect NumberFormatException or the controller logic to throw NullPointerException as intended when account ID is missing. Review input validation for account ID in AppController.,
